speaker: BRUTUS
text: Ride, ride, Messala, ride, and give these bills

speaker: BRUTUS
text: Unto the legions on the other side!

speaker: BRUTUS
text: Let them set on at once, for I perceive

speaker: BRUTUS
text: But cold demeanor in Octavius’ wing,

speaker: BRUTUS
text: And sudden push gives them the overthrow.

speaker: BRUTUS
text: Ride, ride, Messala! Let them all come down.
